TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: sikamasanmusalj a tjaljataladj a meredjanaw i tayuan mavan aicu a zintun a wazaqan a sinipapukeljang a Ji̍t-goa̍t-thâm a pinairangan a ngadan tjanuitjen. kaizuazua imaza i kadjunangan a zintun a wazaqan a caucau nua sethau. cinalivatan sipacacikelan djalan nua palidring masansikadrusa a puluq saka ita a djalanan nua i tayuan basu == kasizuan ==
S.PHON: sikamasanmusaʎ a ʦaʎataɭaɉ a mərəɉanaw i tajuan mavan aiʦu a zintun a wazaqan a sinipapukəʎaŋ a *i*t-gua*t-th*m a pinairaŋan a ŋadan ʦanuiʦən. kaizuazua imaza i kaɉunaŋan a zintun a wazaqan a ʦauʦau nua səthau. ʦinaɭivatan sipaʦaʦikəɭan ɉaɭan nua paɭiɖiŋ masansikaɖusa a puɭuq saka ita a ɉaɭanan nua i tajuan basu == kasizuan ==
S.FORM: sikamasanmusalj a tjaljataladj a meredjanaw i tayuan mavan aicu a zintun a wazaqan a sinipapukeljang a Ji̍t-goa̍t-thâm a pinairangan a ngadan tjanuitjen. kaizuazua imaza i kadjunangan a zintun a wazaqan a caucau nua sethau. cinalivatan sipacacikelan djalan nua palidring masansikadrusa a puluq saka ita a djalanan nua i tayuan basu == kasizuan ==
S.PHON: sikamasanmusaʎ a ʦaʎataɭaɉ a mərəɉanaw i tajuan mavan aiʦu a zintun a wazaqan a sinipapukəʎaŋ a *i*t-gua*t-th*m a pinairaŋan a ŋadan ʦanuiʦən. kaizuazua imaza i kaɉunaŋan a zintun a wazaqan a ʦauʦau nua səthau. ʦinaɭivatan sipaʦaʦikəɭan ɉaɭan nua paɭiɖiŋ masansikaɖusa a puɭuq saka ita a ɉaɭanan nua i tajuan basu == kasizuan ==
